_meta.description: Korean name/shorthand -> canonical English NIKKE name. Built from nikke-synergy.com's translations asset (the same source the bakery bot's Japanese nikke_name_dictionary sync uses; this is the ko field of the same entries, keyed by the Korean value). Generated 2026-07-13 by nikke-sim's research pass.
_meta.note: Includes arena shorthand forms. Keys where the Korean equals the English were dropped. To refresh, re-run the same parse the bot's synergy.ts uses and read the ko field.

dictionary.10개의 대전 상대 토글에 매긴 평가(◎+2 / 〇+1 / ≒0 / △-:
Sum the ratings (◎+2 / 〇+1 / ≒0 / △-1 / ✕-2) from the toggles of the 10 opponents,
then convert the total (-10 to +10) into a 0-10 score using ÷2 + 5.
dictionary.2026년 6월 30일 분배 데미지 관련 조정 사전 안내: June 30, 2026 — Advance Notice on Distributed Damage Adjustments
dictionary.30FPS 환경에서 홍련: 흑영이 풀버스트 중에 1회 더 공격할 수 있는: The case where Scarlet: Black Shadow can attack one extra time during Full Burst under 30 FPS is a judgment error caused by the tick-based combat logic. It is not specific to a particular FPS and can occur with all Nikkes and weapon types, so a short-term fix is difficult.
dictionary.3RL: 로켓 런처가 3발째를 착탄시킨 타이밍: 3RL: the timing when the rocket launcher's 3rd shot lands
dictionary.4. 버스트 속도의 정의와 단위(RL): 4. Definition and Unit (RL) of Burst Speed
dictionary.4RL: 로켓 런처가 4발째를 착탄시킨 타이밍: 4RL: the timing when the rocket launcher's 4th shot lands
dictionary.<b>① 슬롯에 효과가 붙을 확률</b><br>1슬롯=100% / 2슬롯:
1) Chance an effect appears in a slot
Slot 1 = 100% / Slot 2 = 50% / Slot 3 = 30%

2) Which effect appears (no duplicates, renormalized)
listed% ÷ (100% − sum of effects already held)
e.g. drawing Hit Rate while holding Attack(10%) and Charge Dmg(12%) = 12% ÷ (100% − 22%) = 15.38%

3) Stage probability
The stage distribution (given an effect) is the same for 12%/10% types and value-reset: stage 1–5 = 12% / 6–10 = 7% / 11–15 = 1%.
e.g. stage ≥ 11 = 1%×5 = 5% / exactly stage 13 = 1%
Note: the calculation also accounts for the rule that only a blank gear piece gets a guaranteed stage 11 on its very first reforge.

4) Cost
One reforge = 1 + number of locked slots (modules). Key locks spend keys each reforge (20/30); module locks need no keys and are permanent.
dictionary.<p>FANBOX 및 멤버 전용 게시물에서 확장 기능을 순차적으로 제공할: Extended features will be provided sequentially via FANBOX and members-only posts.

dictionary.<strong> 1RL은 대략 1.216초~1.250초</strong>입: 1 RL is roughly 1.216 to 1.250 seconds. The burst-charge speed of other weapons is judged using this rocket-launcher impact as the baseline.

dictionary.Arena EX 전용 저장·복원 기능입니다. Arena EX의 편성 데이: Save/restore feature exclusive to Arena EX. Up to 20 slots of Arena EX team data can be saved and managed. Managed independently of the Team Builder page's saves.

dictionary.Team Builder는 〈승리의 여신: NIKKE〉 아레나·솔로 레이드:
Team Builder is a team composition tool for Goddess of Victory: NIKKE, designed for Arena and Solo Raid.

① Place characters easily by tapping their images.
Instantly grasp element and Burst speed to build the ideal 5-member party.
View 10 team compositions at once — perfect for building Champion Arena and Solo Raid teams.

② Instantly browse the top-ranking compositions for each content, and load them into your own setup.
Use them as a reference when building your teams.

③ Save, load, and export your compositions as images, and manage your favorite teams with memos.
This feature also preserves your Cube selections.

④ View adoption rates and score data per season. The data grows richer with each passing season.
Useful for planning Arena and Solo Raid teams in the NIKKE meta.

Supporters get access to extended save tabs, and can view and load the opponents the selected composition won or lost against.
You can also explore adoption rates on Emilia-free servers.

dictionary.홍련: 흑영 스킬1: 풀차지 분배 데미지 증가 — 3회 250.47%→2: Scarlet: Black Shadow Skill 1: full-charge distributed damage increased — 3 hits 250.47%→283.03%, 6 hits 500%→565%, 9 hits 750.47%→848.03%.
dictionary.홍련: 흑영 스킬3: 장전 피해 버프 150.12%→169.63%로 증가: Scarlet: Black Shadow Skill 3: charge damage buff increased 150.12%→169.63%.
dictionary.홍련: 흑영과 일레그의 데미지 증가는 단독으로는 발생하지 않으며, 마스트: The damage increase on Scarlet: Black Shadow and Elegg does not occur on its own. It happens conditionally when they are combined with distributed-damage buffs like those of Mast: Romantic Maid / Anchor: Innocent Maid, on skills where distributed damage applies to only part of the area. Extra damage occurs when distributed damage and a normal attack are judged at the same time, which is more likely under 30 FPS.
dictionary.홍련: 흑영과 일레그의 분배 데미지 관련 기능의 의도치 않은 동작을 7월: The unintended behavior of the distributed-damage mechanics on Scarlet: Black Shadow and Elegg will be fixed on July 2. To preserve their feel, some skill values are raised as well (based on skill level 10).
dictionary.화면 색상을 라이트 모드/다크 모드로 전환합니다. 눈의 피로를 줄이거나: Switch the color scheme between light mode and dark mode. Useful for reducing eye strain or for use in dark environments. The setting is shared across all pages.
dictionary.효과 미획득 상태에서 80% 확률로 도달 완료 시 필요 개수: Modules needed to complete from zero effects at an 80% chance
dictionary.후원자분들께 배포 중인 PASSWORD는<br>드물게 변경되는 경우도 있:
The PASSWORD distributed to supporters
may occasionally change.
We will share it with anyone who has supported even once! Please reach out via email, a Twitter DM, or a reply.
Please note that we may be slow to notice.
dictionary.후원해 주시는 분이 늘어남으로써, 새로운 기능 추가와 기존 기능 개선을<:
As more people offer support, we can add new features and improve existing ones
more quickly than before.
